subject: docs(specs): add comprehensive social media platform specifications
body:
Reference document covering 2025–2026 image/video dimensions, file types,
safe zones, and best practices for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube,
X/Twitter, Threads, LinkedIn, Pinterest, WhatsApp, and Snapchat.

Notable: Instagram's new 3:4 grid format (1080×1440), expanded carousel
limits, Reels 3-minute cap, Meta's shift to 1440px ad recommendations,
and TikTok's shrinking safe zones.

Tags: docs, specs, platforms, social-media
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: platform-specs
Semver: patch
